summary_en: 2,500,000 shares (11.0% of shares outstanding), ¥1.74B upper limit (¥696/share price ceiling), May 18–Sep 30, 2026 execution window, open-market and ToSTNeT-3 methods
title_en: Notice regarding determination of matters related to acquisition of treasury shares (acquisition of treasury shares based on articles of incorporation per Company Law Article 165(2))
translation_en_brief:
AirTrip Corp. announced on May 15, 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to acquire up to 2,500,000 treasury shares (11.0% of shares outstanding) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥1.74 billion (¥696 per share ceiling). The acquisition period runs from May 18 to September 30, 2026.

The company will execute purchases via two methods: (1) open-market purchases through the Tokyo Stock Exchange via discretionary trading mandate (市場買付け), and (2) off-exchange trades under ToSTNeT-3 (自己株式立会外買付取引).

The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns, support future M&A activity as payment consideration, and improve capital efficiency in response to changing business conditions. This aligns with the company's medium-to-long-term strategy "AirTrip 5000" targeting ¥500 billion in consolidated transaction value and operating profit milestones of ¥5 billion by FY2028.9 and ¥10 billion thereafter.
